recommendations.overview: Scientist turned Entrepreneur Dr. Sethuraman tries to safeguard his newly invented time travel device from falling into the hands of his Evil Twin Brother Aathreya.

recommendations.title: Chain Reaction

recommendations.title: The Cloverfield Paradox
recommendations.overview: Orbiting above a planet on the brink of war, scientists test a device to solve an energy crisis and end up face-to-face with a dark alternate reality.

recommendations.title: Vengeance
recommendations.overview: Ben, a journalist from New York City, travels to West Texas in order to investigate the death of a girl he was hooking up with while recording a murder mystery podcast along the way.

recommendations.title: Dune

recommendations.title: The Return
recommendations.overview: After the death of his father, a brilliant college student returns to his family home where he learns that the horrors from his childhood aren't as dead and gone as he once thought.

recommendations.title: The Philadelphia Experiment

recommendations.title: M3GAN
recommendations.overview: A brilliant toy company roboticist uses artificial intelligence to develop M3GAN, a life-like doll programmed to emotionally bond with her newly orphaned niece. But when the doll's programming works too well, she becomes overprotective of her new fri

recommendations.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
recommendations.overview: A doctor's research into the roots of evil turns him into a hideous depraved fiend.

recommendations.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
recommendations.overview: The starship Enterprise and its crew is pulled back into action when old nemesis, Khan, steals a top secret device called Project Genesis.
